subtitle: Community Rideshare for Maryland
shortDescription: Maryland's community ride-sharing platform. Safe, transparent rides from your neighbors.
fullDescription:
PG Ride is a community-owned rideshare platform serving Maryland. Connect with verified neighborhood drivers for safe, transparent, and affordable rides.

• No surge pricing — fares based on distance and time only
• Verified drivers with live tracking and SOS safety features
• Virtual PG Card for easy payments
• Choose trusted drivers from your community
• Driver ownership program with profit sharing

PG Ride keeps every dollar in the community. Download, create an account, and ride with neighbors — not strangers.
